texto: Don't cohabitate. Don't fornicate. Don't look at pornography. Don't create a standard of beauty. Have your spouse be your standard of beauty. This is one of the great devastating effects of pornography: you lust after people and compare your spouse to them. It's impossible to be satisfied in your marriage if you don't have a standard that is biblical
autor: that standard is always your spouse.
explicacao: Citação de that standard is always your spouse. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Don't cohabitate. Don't fornicate. Don't look at pornography. Don't create a standard of beauty. …” articula reflexao, mark-driscoll, standard em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como casamento e reflexao.
